creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 160715
Poudriere testport log from 9.3-RELEASE jail

Poudriere builds were done on the following jails successfully with this 6.9.3 patch.

9.3-RELEASE-p24      amd64
9.3-RELEASE-p24      i386
10.1-RELEASE-p19     amd64
10.1-RELEASE-p19     i386
10.2-RELEASE-p2      amd64
10.2-RELEASE-p2      i386
11.0-CURRENT r286886 amd64
11.0-CURRENT r286888 i386

portlint -ac returns no errors.

Obsolete the original build failure log for 6.9.2.
